candidate_structures.economic_hypothesis: Urgent informed or mandate-driven aggressors split a parent order across successive volume bars, so efficient signed flow continues after the triggering bar.
candidate_structures.who_pays: Liquidity providers and slower participants absorbing an unfinished parent order.
candidate_structures.signal: Absolute signed-volume fraction is at or above the past-only q90 of the previous 1000 bars, its sign agrees with price change, and absolute signed path efficiency is at least 0.25.
candidate_structures.exit: close of the fifth later event bar

candidate_structures.economic_hypothesis: Extreme signed flow with little price progress is absorbed by resting liquidity and reverses after the aggressive burst exhausts.
candidate_structures.who_pays: Late aggressive entrants whose market orders fail to move price efficiently.
candidate_structures.signal: Absolute signed-volume fraction is at or above the past-only q90 of the previous 1000 bars and absolute price-change/path-length efficiency is at most 0.10.
candidate_structures.exit: close of the fifth later event bar

candidate_structures.economic_hypothesis: A dense same-side burst with efficient price follow-through identifies a genuine urgent sweep whose execution continues over subsequent dollar bars.
candidate_structures.who_pays: Resting liquidity and participants entering before the urgent taker completes execution.
candidate_structures.signal: Trade count is at or above past-only q90 and absolute signed-volume fraction at or above past-only q75 over the previous 1000 bars; flow and price signs agree and absolute path efficiency is at least 0.50.
candidate_structures.exit: close of the third later event bar

candidate_structures.economic_hypothesis: A large signed cash-open aggression state reflects inventory transfer that persists through the next hour while opening participants complete their hedges.
candidate_structures.who_pays: Participants reacting after the opening inventory transfer is already observable.
candidate_structures.signal: At 09:00 CT, aggregate 08:30-09:00 signed aggressor fraction exceeds the median absolute fraction of the prior five sessions.

CONTRE: Rolling quantiles adapt to activity but the two August samples may share seasonal microstructure; candidate validation is forbidden unless the new-dataset tripwire is GREEN.
